race.description: Win Tv & Wagga Racing Supporters Club Mdn Hcp
race.comment: SIYAASI (1) is heading the right way with his form, and will have the benefit of the pole position for his first run over 1400m. He does not have to improve by much to go one better in this. REDFORD RIVER (7) did nothing fresh up of a wide gate on a heavy track at Wagga over 1000m, and he will appreciate the extra 400m second up. If the ground is not too wet, then he can be a sharp improver at odds. SPUNKY REWARD (10) has steadily improved in each of his 2 starts back from a spell, and was only 2 lengths from the winner when fifth at Dubbo a fortnight ago. She is capable of a top 3 finish this time. FLYING BETTY (6) has been trying to win a race for some time, and won't have any fitness concerns fifth up from a spell. She draws nicely, and is another worth including at odds.
